Simple Process
How Fix Axom
Works
01
Select District & Service

Choose your district in Assam and the type of appliance repair you need. We cover all 35 districts.

02
Browse Technician Profiles

View detailed profiles showing technician name, services, working days, location, and contact number.

03
Contact Directly

Call or message the technician directly. No middleman. No commission. Just direct contact.

04
Problem Solved!

Your appliance gets repaired by a verified local technician. Fast, affordable, and reliable service.
